items.name_en: [Highest Version Original Leather Top Tier Factory Match Full Counter Packaging] This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a fashionable, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2024 Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware complements the soft grained texture. Ample space accommodates various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion.

items.name_en: 【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll Cargo small handbag features soft lambskin with a stylish wrinkled effect. items.name_en: 6⃣️ colors available🍠🍠🍠 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains, interpreting a sense of effortless high-end. In the rules of fashion, the word "wander" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casual and luxury. Design Highlights: Eclectic elegance, made from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather interwoven strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype that niche bags are impractical. Whether daily essentials or small items, they can be easily stored. Styling: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiteng, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

items.name_en: Burgundy🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains interprets an effortless sense of luxury. In fashion rules, the word "wanderer" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casualness and luxury. Design Highlights: Unconventional elegance, crafted from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather intertwined strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype of niche bags being impractical. Whether it's daily essentials or small items, it can be easily stored. Style Matching: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or a little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiting, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving the charm of this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

items.name_en: Three colors available 🔮🔮🔮 Large H Real photos 🍠🍠🍠 25B New 🆕 Accordion Bag 🚩🚩🚩 Sparkling Rhinestones 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Mimi Accordion Bag CHANEL Rhinestone Handle Accordion Bag 🎹 Dual-tone crystal handle is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art. The double-layer accordion style has a large capacity and can hold 2 phones 📱, a very practical bag 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and lovely~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! It can make you look refined with any outfit. 4831 Dimensions: 11*18.5*6cm/
